title: Captain Underpants And The Big Bad Battle Of The Bionic Booger Boy Part 1 - The Night Of The Nasty Nostril Nuggets
titleZh: 内裤队长与机械鼻涕怪人大战（上）：恶心鼻屎之夜
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: Melvin turns into a Bionic Booger Boy!

q.en: Who is Melvin Sneedly in George and Harold's class?
q.zh: 在乔治和哈罗德的班里，梅尔文·斯尼德利是个怎样的人？

options.en: The school bully who loves sports
options.zh: 爱运动的校园恶霸（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: The bow-tie-and-glasses brainiac who always gets straight As and tattles
options.zh: 戴领结和眼镜、门门考A、还爱打小报告的学霸
体育老师
学校厨师

explain.en: Melvin Sneedly is 'the kid with the bow tie and the glasses' who always gets straight As and is famous for being the school tattletale — which is exactly why George and Harold make fun of him.
explain.zh: 梅尔文·斯尼德利是“那个戴领结、戴眼镜的孩子”，他门门拿A，而且以爱打小报告闻名——这也正是乔治和哈罗德拿他开涮的原因。

q.en: What is a 'Squishy,' which George and Harold demonstrated in class?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德在课堂上演示的“Squishy（挤挤乐）”是什么？

options.en: Two ketchup packs placed under a toilet seat so they spray when someone sits
options.zh: 把两包番茄酱垫在马桶圈下，有人坐上去就喷出来
一种三明治（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）（你能在书里找到关于这个的线索。）
一种舞蹈动作
一款新电子游戏

explain.en: For Demonstration Speech Day, George and Harold showed how to make a 'Squishy': fold two packs of ketchup, place them under the front bumpy bits of a toilet seat, and wait for someone to sit down — SPLAT!
explain.zh: 在“演示演讲日”，乔治和哈罗德示范了怎么做“挤挤乐”：把两包番茄酱折好，垫在马桶圈前面那两个凸起下面，等人坐上去——噗叽！番茄酱就喷出来了。

q.en: Using the Combine-O-Tron 2000, what two things did Melvin combine to create the world's first bionic cyborg?
q.zh: 梅尔文用“合成器2000”把哪两样东西合在一起，造出了世界上第一个生化机械生物？

options.zh: 一台烤面包机和一只猫

options.en: A toilet seat and a book
options.zh: 一个马桶圈和一本书（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
两包番茄酱

options.en: His pet hamster Sulu and a tiny robot
options.zh: 他的宠物仓鼠苏鲁和一个小机器人

explain.en: Melvin placed his pet hamster Sulu at one end of his cart and his tiny homemade robot at the other, then used the Combine-O-Tron 2000 to merge them into 'the world's first self-contained, warm-blooded, fuzzy bionic cyborg.'
explain.zh: 梅尔文把宠物仓鼠苏鲁放在推车一头，把自制的迷你机器人放在另一头，然后用“合成器2000”把它们融合成了“世界上第一个自带系统、温血、毛茸茸的生化机械生物”。

q.en: How did George and Harold end up in the detention room?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德是怎么被关进留堂室的？

options.en: Melvin tattled that they taught everyone the Squishy trick
options.zh: 梅尔文告状说他们教大家玩“挤挤乐”恶作剧

options.en: They made a comic about the principal
options.zh: 他们画了一本关于校长的漫画（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）
他们弄丢了班级宠物
他们逃了“展示与讲述”课

explain.en: After Mr. Krupp got ketchup in his underwear from a Squishy, Melvin proudly reported, 'George and Harold taught everybody a trick today where you put ketchup packs under a toilet seat.' Mr. Krupp shouted, 'Mr. Beard and Mr. Hutchins — OUT!'
explain.zh: 克拉普先生被“挤挤乐”喷了一内裤番茄酱后，梅尔文得意地告状：“乔治和哈罗德今天教大家把番茄酱包垫在马桶圈下面。”克拉普先生大吼：“比尔德先生和哈钦斯先生——出去！”

q.en: What comic book did George and Harold make to get back at Melvin?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德为了报复梅尔文，画了哪本漫画？

options.en: Captain Underpants and the Terrifying Tale of the Tattle-Tron 2000
options.zh: 《内裤队长与可怕的“告状机2000”传说》

options.en: The Adventures of Melvin the Magnificent
options.zh: 《了不起的梅尔文历险记》

options.en: Captain Underpants and the Wrath of the Wedgie Woman
options.zh: 《内裤队长与邪恶Wedgie女侠的愤怒》（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: How to Be a Good Student
options.zh: 《怎样做个好学生》

explain.en: In detention, the boys created a comic starring Melvin as a tattling meanie: 'Captain Underpants and the Terrifying Tale of the Tattle-Tron 2000,' where Mayor Melvin builds a robot jail and Captain Underpants has to stop him.
explain.zh: 在留堂室里，男孩们画了一本以爱打小报告的梅尔文为主角的漫画：《内裤队长与可怕的“告状机2000”传说》——里面梅尔文当上市长后造了机器人监狱，最后内裤队长出面制止他。

q.en: What went wrong with Melvin's Combine-O-Tron experiment that turned him into the Bionic Booger Boy?
q.zh: 梅尔文的“合成器”实验哪里出了岔子，让他变成了“机械鼻涕怪人”？

options.zh: 乔治偷偷改了设置
他加错了机器人

options.en: He sneezed at the last second, adding his boogers as a third element
options.zh: 他在最后一秒打了个喷嚏，把鼻涕当成了第三个合成元素

options.en: The machine ran out of batteries
options.zh: 机器没电了（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Just before the machine combined Melvin with his robot, he sneezed 'A-a-A-Chooo!' The Combine-O-Tron recalculated: 'Combining THREE elements' — Melvin, the robot, AND his boogers — turning him into the Bionic Booger Boy.
explain.zh: 就在机器要把梅尔文和机器人融合的前一秒，他打了个“阿——阿——阿嚏！”“合成器”重新计算：“正在融合三个元素”——梅尔文、机器人，还有他的鼻涕——于是他变成了“机械鼻涕怪人”。

q.en: At show-and-tell, what amazing trick did the bionic hamster Sulu perform?
q.zh: 在“展示与讲述”课上，生化仓鼠苏鲁表演了什么惊人绝技？

options.zh: 他唱了一首歌
他做对了一道数学题（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: He spat watermelon seeds to blast a dead tree to splinters
options.zh: 他吐西瓜籽把一棵枯树击成碎片
他骑了一辆迷你自行车

explain.en: Sulu stuffed a whole watermelon into his cheek, then spat the seeds out the window with expert precision, blasting the dead tree at the end of the playground into a pile of twigs and sawdust.
explain.zh: 苏鲁把一整个西瓜塞进腮帮子，然后从窗口把西瓜籽精准地吐出去，把操场尽头那棵枯树打成了碎树枝和木屑。

q.en: After becoming the Bionic Booger Boy, why did Melvin win every football game?
q.zh: 变成“机械鼻涕怪人”后，梅尔文为什么每场橄榄球赛都赢？

options.zh: 他用机器人作弊
因为他跑得特别快

options.en: The coach gave him extra points
options.zh: 教练给他加了额外分数（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: Nobody wanted to tackle a snot-covered monster
options.zh: 没人愿意去擒抱一个满身鼻涕的怪物

explain.en: The book points out a 'positive side' to being a Bionic Booger Boy: Melvin won every football game 'because no one wanted to tackle him.'
explain.zh: 书里说变成“机械鼻涕怪人”也有“好的一面”：梅尔文每场橄榄球赛都赢，“因为没人愿意去擒抱他”。

q.en: What silly idea did George suggest to reverse Melvin's transformation?
q.zh: 乔治提出了一个什么搞笑点子来逆转梅尔文的变化？

options.en: Wash him in the swimming pool
options.zh: 在泳池里给他洗澡（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: Take the batteries out and put them in backward
options.zh: 把电池取出来反着装回去
再给他催眠一次
喝下超能力果汁

explain.en: When Melvin said he'd need six months to build a Separatron 1000, George joked, 'You should try taking the batteries out of that Combine-O-Thingy and putting them in backward. That might reverse the effect.'
explain.zh: 梅尔文说要花六个月造一台“分离机1000”时，乔治开玩笑说：“你可以试试把那台合成器的电池取出来反着装回去，说不定就能逆转了。”

q.en: What machine does Melvin say he is building to turn himself back into a normal boy?
q.zh: 梅尔文说他正在造什么机器，好让自己变回普通男孩？

options.zh: “合成器3000”（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: The Separatron 1000 (which will take six months)
options.zh: “分离机1000”（据说要花六个月）
催眠戒指
一台巨型洗衣机

explain.en: Melvin tells the class, 'I'm building a Separatron 1000, which will reverse the effects and turn me back into a boy again. It'll just take six months to finish.'
explain.zh: 梅尔文对全班说：“我正在造一台‘分离机1000’，它能逆转效果、让我变回男孩。不过要把它造好得花六个月。”
